plain_text:
$ claude

> Plan API rate limiting implementation

- Evaluated rate limiting algorithms: fixed window, sliding window, token bucket, leaky bucket
- Recommended token bucket with Redis for distributed rate limiting
- Proposed per-customer rate limits: 100 req/min (free), 1000 req/min (pro), 10000 req/min (enterprise)
- Designed graceful degradation: return 429 with Retry-After header
- Outlined implementation plan across 3 PRs

> /quit

Session ended.
